# Stardew Valley Companion

> A free, browser-based progress tracker for Stardew Valley. No account required. All data is stored locally in the browser. Supports multiple playthroughs with save file import or manual setup.

## Features

- [Dashboard](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/dashboard): At-a-glance overview of an entire playthrough — stats, skills, progress, and perfection score.
- [Community Center](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/community-center): Track every bundle room and donation. See exactly what is still needed to complete the Community Center.
- [Joja Route](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/joja): Track Joja Community Development Form progress as an alternative to the Community Center.
- [Collections](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/collections): Monitor fish, crops, minerals, artifacts, cooking, crafting, forageables, animal products, artisan goods, monster loot, special items, and rarecrows with progress bars.
- [Villagers](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/villagers): Track heart levels for every villager, marriage status, and heart event progress.
- [Farm / Character](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/farm/character): Skill levels, professions, mastery, tool upgrades, and backpack level.
- [Farm / Buildings](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/farm/buildings): Track farm building construction and upgrades.
- [Farm / Animals](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/farm/animals): Track farm animal counts and mood.
- [Farm / Ginger Island](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/farm/ginger-island): Track Ginger Island unlock and parrot upgrade progress.
- [Mines](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/mines): Mine depth, Skull Cavern progress, key items, and monster slayer goals.
- [Town](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/town): Track town restoration and community progress.
- [Calendar](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/calendar): Seasonal calendar showing available crops, fish, and events.
- [Grandpa's Shrine](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/grandpa): Track Grandpa's evaluation score and candles.
- [Perfection](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/perfection): Full breakdown of perfection score across all 11 categories with waiver tracking.
- [Gear](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/gear): Track weapon, ring, boot, and hat upgrades.
- [Quests](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/quests): Track special orders and quest progress.
- [Items Needed](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/items-needed): Consolidated view of all items still needed across bundles and goals.

## Technical

- Built with Next.js 16, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, and Flowbite React.
- All playthrough data stored in browser localStorage — nothing is sent to any server.
- Save file import: parses Stardew Valley XML save files automatically.
- Supports multiple simultaneous playthroughs with independent state.
- Data can be exported as JSON for backup and re-imported at any time.

## Optional

- [Playthroughs](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/playthrough/list): Manage all saved playthroughs.
- [Settings](https://stardew-valley.gamerdex.app/settings): Import, export, or reset playthrough data.
